title: 積み上げた本当のこと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My meeting with Mejiro Ryan lasts until late in
the evening as we prepare for a scrimmage the
next day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That should be it. Thanks for staying out
with me so late!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I get home, I gotta take good care of my
hamstrings to be ready for tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right! I promise I'll do great tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan is full of vigor, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Heavy rain is on the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to the forecasts, we face a downpour on
the day of the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the announcement? It seems like the
track is gonna be in pretty bad condition.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
For real? Ugh, I have absolutely no motivation
when it's raining... Think I'll just do some light
running today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the drop in motivation in the air around
me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm done warming up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This? It's nothing! Makes no difference to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If anything... I'm excited! Getting myself psyched
in tough conditions is a real test of character!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Come rain or shine, or storm or thunder... There's
no hiding all the effort I've put into training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No matter the time or place, I'm goin' all out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in the pouring rain, Ryan's eyes shine with
enthusiasm.
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
Let's blow that rain right off the track!
Let's blow that rain right off the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in the pouring rain, Ryan's eyes shine with
enthusiasm.
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
Let's blow that rain right off the track!
Let's blow that rain right off the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Okay... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the scrimmage begins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That power, and on a track like this?! Tch, I can't
lose now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Full... STREEENGTH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Giving all of her might, Mejiro Ryan has a
fantastic race and finishes first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: U-um, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Good race! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You ran so well. It really pushed me to try harder,
despite the terrible weather.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, me too! If it's okay, could you run with us
again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's disregard for the rain motivates all the
other racers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Leave that rain to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the scrimmage begins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: AAAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan doesn't let the bad track conditions slow her
down and wins the race by a landslide. Then, after
the race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Did you see it? I won—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh hey, the rain stopped.
choice_data_list: You really did run the rain right off the track!
You really did run the rain right off the track!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Please, there's no way. You're
exaggerating...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You know what, Ryan? I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Only you could pull off a run like that in pouring rain. It's frustrating to admit it, but you beat me by a mile.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! That's the kind of running I wanted to
show today, so I'm glad I could.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I trained my body so much that not even the rain
can stop me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But even if I won by chance, I'm still happy! Ooh,
yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's smile is made even brighter by the
post-rain sunset.
